name: Heary Fig Oatbran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup California dried figs, finely chopped
2 tablespoons Honey; OR 1/4 cup Brown sugar, firmly packed
1 1/2 cups Flour (Oat flour), Whole Wheat or All-purpose
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine bran flakes with apple juice. Moisten the flakes evenly.
2. Add egg substitute, milk, apple juice concentrate, oil, mashed banana, chopped figs, and honey to the bran mixture. Mix well.
3. In a small bowl, mix flour, oatmeal, cinnamon, baking soda, and baking powder.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the bran mixture and mix well.
5. Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
6. Spoon batter into paper-lined muffin cups.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until done.
Yield: 12 muffins
